ocr_snippet: Patient Name : 6 Years/Male Admission No : IP251978 Admission Date : 10-Mar-2026 Consultant : Department : PAEDIATRICS Patient Address : ENTERIC CULTURE PROVEN NUTRITIONAL ANEMIA CHIEF COMPLAINTS Complaints of fever x 6 days (3-4 episodes) Complaints of vomiting / day x 7 days.
